taglines: I craft mobile-web apps from first principles.
I orchestrate AI systems & embedded experiences.
I build software that doesn't lie about how it works.

About.lead: I've never liked sticking to just one niche.
About.p1: My curiosity takes me everywhere — from game engines and AI orchestration to embedded systems and mobile-web. For me, software isn't about picking a 'side'; it's about having the drive to explore how it all works under the hood.
About.p2: If there's something I don't know, I'll sit down and grind for a week — or a month — until I can build something real with it. I don't believe I've truly learned a technology until I've made it work in a project that someone else can actually use.

form.name: Name
form.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
